_comment_how_to_add_country: HOW TO ADD NEW COUNTRY: 1) Add a new market key with label/lang/summary. 2) Extend MarketKey in packages/types/src/index.ts. 3) Add static trends in packages/shared/src/index.ts for fallback. 4) Add any local competitors in competitors.json. 5) Add UI option in apps/breason routes. 6) Run turbo run type-check before commit.

brazil.label: Brazil
brazil.summary: Relationship-first messaging with human warmth and clear business outcomes.

poland.label: Poland
poland.summary: Pragmatic and skeptical market that values specificity and grounded claims.

germany.label: Germany
germany.summary: Trust and compliance centric communication with clear structure and reliability cues.
